arts.sum: Leganes are currently just one point above the relegation zone in La Liga. A win could see them climb as high as 15th, but they've lost their previous two fixtures in the league. Alaves have picked ...

arts.ttl: Duk had done his Aberdeen time as Jimmy Thelin reveals thinking behind Dons departures
arts.sum: The former Benfica man headed to La Liga while Angus MacDonald, James McGarry and Slobodan Rubezic also left
